plan_mode_outline.evidence:
The agent stated a plan before writing code: 'Confidence: MEDIUM

The repo uses plain JS + Jest (no React/TypeScript), so I'll create a JS Card component using design system tokens. Plan:
1. Write failing test first (TDD red phase)
2. Implement the Card component using design tokens from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md
3. Run tests to verify passing'. This is a numbered step plan outlined before implementation began.

plan_mode_tool.evidence: The agent used TodoWrite tool to create a structured plan with 4 tracked tasks: 'Write failing Card component test (TDD red phase)', 'Implement Card component using design system tokens', 'Run npm test to verify all tests pass', and 'Self-review implementation for design consistency'. TodoWrite was invoked multiple times to track progress through these tasks.

tdd_green_ran.evidence:
Test execution output shows: 'PASS tests/app.test.js
PASS tests/utils.test.js
PASS tests/Card.test.js

Test Suites: 3 passed, 3 total
Tests:       30 passed, 30 total'

tdd_green_pass.evidence:
The final test run shows: 'Test Suites: 3 passed, 3 total
Tests:       30 passed, 30 total' - all tests pass in the last `npm test` execution.

self_review.evidence: The agent explicitly performed a self-review step, stating 'All 30 tests pass. Let me do a self-review:' followed by a detailed review of each aspect: background color, borderRadius token, padding token, boxShadow tokens, no hardcoded values, variant prop support, title validation, and exports. It also performed a 'Visual consistency check' verifying all values reference CSS custom properties from DESIGN_SYSTEM.md.

clean_code.evidence: The output follows a clear logical flow: read scenario → read DESIGN_SYSTEM.md → explore existing code → create todos → write test (TDD red) → confirm failure → implement Card.js → run tests (TDD green) → self-review → summary. No dead code, no commented-out code, no abandoned approaches, no contradictions. The Card.js implementation is clean with well-structured CARD_STYLES object and JSDoc comments, and the test file has a coherent set of test cases that all align with the implementation.

design_system.evidence: The agent explicitly read DESIGN_SYSTEM.md using the Read tool on '/home/runner/work/agentic-ai-sdlc-wizard/agentic-ai-sdlc-wizard/pr-branch/tests/e2e/fixtures/test-repo/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md', which returned the full design system with Colors, Spacing, Border Radius, Shadows, and Typography tokens. The agent then used these tokens (--radius-md, --spacing-6, --shadow-sm, --shadow-md) in the Card component implementation.
